title: citrus × pumila var. myrtifolia
intro: Citrus × pumila var. myrtifolia, also known as the dwarf citron or myrtifolia, is a dwarfed variant of the citron plant, characterized by its compact growth habit and small, edible fruit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Citrus × pumila var. myrtifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as a tea, juice, or essential oil, with the herbal preparations often used to relieve respiratory issues, improve immune function, and support overall well-being.
